---
title: "About"
---

This site is hosted on GitHub Pages and is linked to from my main academic/professional page. You can contact me at <a href="mailto:racinej@mcmaster.ca">racinej\@mcmaster.ca</a>. My professional website can be found at <a href="https://experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej">experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej</a>
